rules.feedback: You're ~{{timing.mean_ms}}ms off-beat ({{timing.sign}}). Start with a metronome at {{suggested_bpm}} BPM.

drill.title: 1-2-3-tap with metronome
drill.how: Mark a micro-pause on 2/4. Focus on hitting each beat precisely.

rules.feedback: Your timing needs refinement (~{{timing.mean_ms}}ms {{timing.sign}}). Practice with clearer beat emphasis.

drill.title: Beat emphasis practice
drill.how: Emphasize beats 1 and 3 with slight weight shifts.

rules.feedback: You remain in double support too long ({{weight.transfer_ratio}}% clear transfers). Shift weight before the next beat.

drill.title: Side step + pause
drill.how: Exaggerate hip movement on 2/4 over the support foot.

rules.feedback: Torso tilted {{posture.deg}}°. Lift sternum and engage lats.

drill.title: Wall + chest up
drill.how: Touch wall with back of head and lower back; breathe keeping chest up.

rules.feedback: Watch your posture - slight lean of {{posture.deg}}°. Keep your spine neutral.

drill.title: Posture awareness
drill.how: Practice basic steps while imagining a string pulling your head up.

rules.feedback: Hip movement is minimal ({{hips.amp_deg}}°). Bachata is about hip isolation!

drill.title: Hip figure-eight
drill.how: Stand in front of mirror and practice figure-eight hip movements. Focus on isolating hips from torso.

rules.feedback: Increase your hip amplitude ({{hips.amp_deg}}°). Let your hips lead the movement.

drill.title: Hip isolation practice
drill.how: Side steps with exaggerated hip drops on each weight transfer.

rules.feedback: Your arm movement is rigid ({{arms.smoothness}} smoothness). Focus on flowing and connecting your whole body.

drill.title: Floating arms
drill.how: Keep arms 10-15cm from torso and let them flow naturally with body movement.

rules.feedback: Try to make your arm movements more fluid ({{arms.smoothness}} smoothness).

drill.title: Arm flow practice
drill.how: Practice arm movements separately, focusing on smooth transitions.
